rulings.Case Title: VALERIE ANN CARLING et al VS. ALBAY CONSTRUCTION COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: LATE TENTATIVE: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, JUNE 8, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 1. Defendant Cahill Contractors¿ motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. A hearing is required unless counsel for the moving defendant speaks to the plaintiff and is told that the plaintiff does not contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Successor-Ininterest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: LATE TENTATIVE: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, JUNE 8, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to appoint a successor-in-interest and for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SALVADORE PENA et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: LATE TENTATIVE: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, JUNE 8, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 3. The motion will be heard in Department 206. Defendant Ford Motor Company¿s motion to quash service of summons is granted. Margaret Wilson¿s declaration is credible evidence sufficient to overcome the rebuttable presumption created by plaintiff¿s proof of service that defendant was properly served. = (220/JJM)
